package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_framework_performance_template_execute_to_string_then_write: Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag template rendering to strings before writing to the response writer.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule538NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario538Negative(records []Rule538NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
